question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/reconciliation/BalanceReconciliationService.java -> Scope: High: Reorganizing transaction history without direct theft of funds'] [Function: reconcile()] Can an unprivileged external user insert a large number of account_balance_file records to cause the reconcile() loop to run for an extremely long time, and during that window insert reorganized transaction data that only becomes visible after the reconciliation window has already passed, causing the reorganization to be permanently missed?
